routes.title: Birth of Hip-Hop
routes.summary: Wie lokale Partys, DJ-Technik, Bronx-Communitys und Medienverbreitung aus Hip-Hop eine globale Kulturform machten.
routes.thesis: Hip-Hop entsteht aus DJ-Praxis, Community-Raeumen, urbanen Bedingungen und Medienverbreitung, nicht aus einem einzelnen Ursprungspunkt.

routes.title: Disco To Dance Music
routes.summary: How New York club spaces, DJs, sound systems, 12-inch mixes, and labels turned disco into modern dance music.
routes.thesis: After its mainstream peak, disco does not disappear; it continues into post-disco, garage, electro, freestyle, and modern remix culture.

routes.title: Punk & New Wave Downtown
routes.summary: How downtown New York venues, art spaces, fanzines, and independent labels turned punk into new wave, no wave, and crossover culture.
routes.thesis: Punk and new wave downtown emerged from a dense network of clubs, art scenes, independent media, and labels rather than from one venue alone. CBGB became the central node, but the wider scene moved through glam, no wave, post-punk, dance crossover, and global media circulation.
